name: Sesame-Amaranth Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Milk, Soy Milk or Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the liquid ingredients.
3. Combine the wet and dry mixtures until well blended.
4. Transfer the batter to an 9-inch x 13-inch cake pan that has been greased and floured.
5. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Allow the cake to cool slightly before cutting into small wedges.
